entries.name: ARA Core
entries.description: Dependency boundaries, resource/version model, typed workflows, effects, ports, state/evidence separation, baseline security, and evaluation.

entries.name: ARA Durable
entries.description: Long-running execution, atomic transition commit, journal, fencing, idempotency, reconciliation, waits, resume, and replay.

entries.name: ARA Multi-Tenant
entries.description: Tenant/workspace isolation, scoped identity, quotas, data governance, and isolation testing.

entries.name: ARA Enterprise Operations
entries.description: Control plane, execution cells, SLOs, disaster recovery, audit/usage completeness, and provider lifecycle.

entries.name: ARA Marketplace
entries.description: Signed package releases, exact locks, permissions, sandboxing, installation, rollback, quarantine, and revocation.

entries.name: ARA High-Assurance
entries.description: Fail-closed critical gates, strong oversight, tamper evidence, independent review, and higher-assurance testing.

entries.name: ARA Regulated
entries.description: Intended-purpose governance, data rights, retention, legal holds, control mapping, and regulated evidence.
